context: The TurnTable Top 100 Nigeria year-end chart for 2025 showed a maturing ecosystem where street-hop, Afropop, and DIY artists competed. Davido's emotional 'With You' featuring Omah Lay topped editorial charts, while Fido's 'Joy Is Coming' was TurnTable's data-backed No. 1. Rema continued his commercial evolution, and fresh voices like Poco Lee and Chella signaled a diversified new chapter for Nigerian pop.

tracks.title: Hey Jago
tracks.artist: Poco Lee feat. Shoday & Rahman Jago
